text:
September 4th: Part 10 (94⑩, Kugatsu Yokka (Jū)) is the 111 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Kortopi tells the other Phantom Troupe members that the copied Scarlet Eyes are slowly moving down. Chrollo says that they must be inside an elevator, guessing that the Nostrade Family members are leaving. Nobunaga thinks that they should hurry, and as a nervous Squala is seen inside an elevator at the Hotel Beitacle, Chrollo tells the others to stay close and that they will capture them together. He then tells Pakunoda that she will ask them about Uvogin and that Nobunaga is free to deal with them afterward.

An overview map of the city is shown with the locations of various individuals as the Spiders begin to sprint through the rain toward the hotel. Kurapika sees them heading in that direction, and Leorio worries that they will be faster than a car since it's almost rush hour. Kurapika suddenly exits the car and tells Leorio to wait there until he calls him. Gon runs after him and says that he has an idea.

Killua tells Kurapika by phone that they are outside and that Melody said the Troupe is heading northwest. Kurapika reveals that he is already chasing after them, and Killua worries that it's a bad idea to follow them on foot since they will sense him, but Kurapika hangs up before Killua can say anything else. The Troupe members run along the walls and startle the people walking with umbrellas, with one saying that they must have been ninjas.

Kortopi reveals that the copied eyes are now moving at 25 mph toward two o'clock, and Chrollo guesses that the people got into a car. Squala is seen driving with his dogs in the car and telling them that while he planned to wait until he found another job, it's his last day working for the Nostrade Family. Killua calls Leorio and wonders where Gon is. Leorio replies that he ran after Kurapika, telling Killua that he is struggling to make it to the hotel through all the traffic. Killua says that they will have to follow Kurapika too, upset that he abandoned their plan.

Chrollo suddenly tells the others that they are being followed, surprising Machi and Shizuku and causing Nobunaga to quickly remove the covering from his katana and wonder where the chain user is. Chrollo orders Nobunaga, Pakunoda, and Kortopi to keep moving toward the hotel before he, Machi, and Shizuku (now holding Blinky) suddenly turn around and stop in place, forcing Kurapika and Gon to dart behind cover. Chrollo asks Shizuku and Machi if they saw them as he slowly walks in their direction. Shizuku answers that one is behind the trash can and Machi adds that one is in the alley.

After Chrollo tells them to keep watching that direction and the two begin to use Gyo around their eyes, Kurapika readies his chains and prepares for a fight. Gon knows that Kurapika has no chance against three Troupe members and decides to reveal himself, apologizing and promising to stop chasing after them. Shizuku is left confused, but Machi recognizes Gon from their earlier encounter. Chrollo asks if he's the kid that Nobunaga wanted him to meet, and Machi adds that there's one more, telling him to show himself.

After Killua nonchalantly steps out, Machi wonders what they want since the Mafia's reward was canceled. Killua feigns shock and Gon waits nervously in silence. Machi remains skeptical and asks what they should do with them. After telling her to seize them, Chrollo then calls Phinks and tells them to come to the hotel. After binding their hands with her thread, Machi asks if they should get rid of them right there, but Chrollo trusts her earlier hunch about their possible connection to the chain user

Gon then asks Chrollo how he can kill people who have nothing to do with them, causing Chrollo to look at him with a serious expression and chuckle at his bloodlust even after surrendering. He is unsure at first, but then says that he may only be able to do so because they have nothing to do with him. He adds that he doesn't like to discuss his motives, but reveals that the reason may be the key to understanding himself. As Gon stands in silence and Killua is left confused by his words, Chrollo says that they will head to the hotel and wait for the others, telling Machi and Shizuku to kill the two boys if they try to escape.

Kurapika and Melody follow the Troupe at a distance, with Melody stressing that they can only get so close now that the Troupe has their guard up (also telling Kurapika to use Zetsu). Kurapika is left feeling angry and helpless, but Melody tells him to stay patient and stresses that Gon and Killua let themselves be caught because no one will be able to stop the Troupe if they capture him. Kurapika calms down and apologizes, but Melody assures him that they just need to wait and asks about Squala. Kurapika guesses that he left his phone at the hotel since he isn't answering. Squala is seen stuck in traffic as Nobunaga, Pakunoda, and Kortopi stand around his car. While Pakunoda says that he isn't the chain user, Nobunaga points out that he was on the list, telling him to get out of the car. As he exits the car and lets his dogs leave behind him, Squala says to himself that he has experienced his share of carnage and gained a six sense which is telling him that it's his day to die.
